disclaimer: Documentation and organizational patterns from field experience. Not legal advice.

templates.body:
ERISA EVIDENCE BINDER CHECKLIST
[ ] Plan document / SPD
[ ] Severance offer
[ ] Signed agreement copy
[ ] Payment log (mf-tpl-069)
[ ] Cut or stop notices
[ ] WARN or layoff notice if any
[ ] Admin correspondence
[ ] Timeline one-pager
NOT LEGAL ADVICE. For organization only.

TAB ASSEMBLY LOG
Tab: _______________  Document: _______________  Date: _______
Source: _______________  Page count: ___  [ ] redacted for sharing

TIMELINE ONE-PAGER (facts only)
Date | Event | Source doc
_____|_______|____________
_____|_______|____________
Prepared for: counsel review  Not a legal filing.

GROUP PATTERN MATRIX (scrub names for external use)
Ref | Same cut? | Same plan language? | Payment stop month
____|___________|_____________________|___________________
Use for pattern only; each claimant needs own binder.
